economic_notes: Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP (99.99% owned GBE) operates as a government business partnership with revenue of $10,392,219 in 2023. Band has guaranteed LLP bank loan of $2,585,206. Band has investments in All Nations Trust Company and Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to determine appropriate accounting treatment for investment in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (cost vs modified equity basis). Ashcroft Indian Band Holding Corporation is consolidated subsidiary. Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP is accounted for under modified equity method as a GBE with partners' deficiency of $181,071. Long-term debt of $562,239 was fully repaid during the year. total_government_transfers includes ISC $2,424,943 less ISC recovery $32,652 plus FNHA $470,339 plus Province of BC $283,261 = $3,145,891. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
